# United U-Li Corporation Berhad

Malaysia's leading manufacturer of cable support and steel systems, established 1978, listed on Bursa Malaysia (7133).

## About
- Founded: 1978
- Incorporated: 1983
- Listed: Bursa Malaysia (7133)
- Registration: 200001008131 (510737-H)
- HQ: Lot.7, Jalan 6/1, Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia
- Phone: 603-5870 3300 / 603-5870 3310
- Email: salescss@uli.com.my

## Products
Cable Support Systems, Metal Framing Systems, Floor Trunking Systems, Wire Mesh Tray Systems, Conduits Pipe & Accessories, Custom Made Solutions, Lighting Systems

## Industries
Construction, Commercial & Industrial, Telecom & Data Centres, Energy & Utilities, Transportation & Marine, Oil and Gas, Government Buildings

- https://uli.com.my
